info.title: Otto External API
info.description: LAN-facing API for Otto runtime control and observability. This API manages runtime status, jobs, prompts, model defaults, and interactive background one-shot runs. It does not execute arbitrary shell commands or provide direct database access.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Runtime status, restart, and self-awareness snapshots

tags.name: Prompts
tags.description: Interactive prompt resolution and file management

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Model catalog and flow default management

tags.name: BackgroundJobs
tags.description: Interactive background one-shot runs. POST requests attempt immediate execution and status is polled via session id.

get.description: Returns current runtime state, active process statuses, operational limits, recent decisions, and open risks.
